title: per-site voice configuration
description: EPIC4-10 (ADR-0051): the per-site `voice` config block. Studio-level SCHEMA (reusable); each voice-enabled project repo carries an instance at config/voice.yml (kdc is instance 1), mirroring how the source registry schema is studio-level and data/sources.yml is per-project (ADR-0025). Holds ONLY non-secret control config and script KEYS — never a Twilio auth token and never a PIN (approved PINs live in the provider secret store, injected at runtime; ADR-0023 §3, secrets-inventory.yml). The two cost guardrails are independently toggleable; scripts/voice_guardrails.py consumes this block verbatim. Spoken copy is gnome-authored content referenced here by key and stored in the site's scripts file (data/voice/scripts.yml), style-lint clean. Pattern doc: docs/voice.md.

site.description: The repo this voice config belongs to (e.g. 'kdc'). Must match the repo it lives in.

enabled.description: Master switch: is the number LIVE? Must stay false until BOTH enabled guardrails pass the sysop/STEERCO cost-guardrail UAT (ADR-0051 launch-blocker). The scripts/data are built and provable while this is false.

public_number.description: The published phone number in E.164 (e.g. '+1XXXXXXXXXX'), or null before provisioning. NOT secret — it is printed on the public page. The Twilio auth token is NOT here (provider secret store).

retention_days.description: How long call recordings are retained before deletion. Stated on the public page. 0 = delete immediately after transcription.

scripts_file.description: Path (in this repo) to the gnome-authored spoken-copy file (key -> text), e.g. 'data/voice/scripts.yml'. Every *_script key below must resolve to an entry there.

pin_gate.description: (a) Access PIN gate — pre-cost abuse control. DTMF digits only; deterministic compare-to-approved-set; no speech-to-text, so the gate itself is near-free. Approved PINs are NOT here — they live in the provider secret store, injected by the webhook handler at runtime.

max_tries.description: Attempts allowed before the call ends kindly.

prompt_script.description: Script key: the opening PIN request.

retry_script.description: Script key: the warm between-tries guidance.

reject_script.description: Script key: the kind goodbye after tries are exhausted.

mailbox_cap.description: (b) Mailbox-capacity cap — the spend ceiling. At most max_calls transcript-producing calls per rolling window; when full, play the full script and end the call BEFORE recording/transcription, so a full mailbox costs only the greeting.

max_calls.description: Transcript-producing calls allowed per rolling window.

full_script.description: Script key: the kind mailbox-full message.
